codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly normalizes tool names with case-insensitive lookup, alias resolution, and MCP format parsing. All 18 normalization tests pass. Two minor dead code warnings exist but are non-blocking.

issues.description: MockTool.category field is never read - dead code warning
